title: doronicum carpetanum subsp. kuepferi
intro: Doronicum carpetanum subsp. kuepferi, also known as the Alpine Leopard's Bane, is a rare and endangered subspecies of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the western Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Doronicum carpetanum subsp. kuepferi include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots in tincture form.
